publishedAbstract: ODF Regional DR bad pvc label causes rbd mirror image status " split brain " Application fails over to DR site without issue: AFTER FAILBACK FROM DR TO PRIMARY The split-brain detected on DR site (peer_sites:) mirror image status captured from Primary. ~~~ $ rbd-p ocs-storagecluster-cephblockpool mirror image status csi-vol-fd51d418-33a7-4ede-bb30-ff1ae814c423 csi-vol-fd51d418-33a7-4ede-bb30-ff1ae814c423: global_id: d3d6956e-6468-417f-94ec-c19441176636 state: up+stopped description: local image is primary service: a on ebar1xxx.ocp-a.hip-xxx.xxx.xxx.xxx last_update: 2024-02-08 20:57:07 peer_sites: name: 14cb27f6-a4fa-4be5-9a68-b61d9ed7d005 state: up+error description: split-brain detected last_update: 2024-02-08 20:57:06 snapshots: 10592.mirror.primary.d3d6956e-6468-417f-94ec-c19441176636.da884f2c-635d-42cc-a19c-ac3c7b5ee99d (peer_uuids:[939a2326-1544-4b28-914f-77c1bc48eccf]) last_update: 2024-02-08 20:57:06 snapshots: 10592.mirror.primary.d3d6956e-6468-417f-94ec-c19441176636.da884f2c-635d-42cc-a19c-ac3c7b5ee99d (peer_uuids:[939a2326-1544-4b28-914f-77c1bc48eccf]) ~~~
publishedTitle: ODF Regional DR bad pvc label causes rbd mirror image status " split brain "
